TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: smiyey tmalam myasa owas na piyiyt "sili' laga ba'un musa sali na krakis la, ppsiyey ro kwara ppgluw memow plukus lukus lmwan musa sali ina kya laga, ini tkkoh skal yow na pns'unan, mnangi maha nya mwah mtisan, ms'un mcpung owas na lmuhuw, mkal yow na 'nxan naha nanak, ppsiyey ga lmon maras rami ro uwow ro sinuw, msromul mkayal bkis na gluw knerin ro kmayan maha, "nyu cu mwah mihuy bulit cnsali mo." musa smwal lungan gluw ina la, smwan lungan naha laga, ppsiyey ga mwah mgleng pkayal yow na gaga cpung musa pisa btiyux ro y'aya innaras naha.
S.PHON: s~…ēmijej tmalam mjas~…ēa owas~…ē na pijijt "s~…ēili Ē la…£a ő≤a Ēun mus~…ēa s~…ēali na krakis~…ē la, pps~…ēijej ro kwara pp…£luw memow plukus~…ē lukus~…ē lmwan mus~…ēa s~…ēali ina kja la…£a, ini tkkońß s~…ēkal jow na pns~…ē Ēunan, mnaŇči mańßa nja mwańß mtis~…ēan, ms~…ē Ēun m ¶~ ®puŇč owas~…ē na lmuńßuw, mkal jow na Ēnxan nańßa nanak, pps~…ēijej …£a lmon maras~…ē rami ro uwow ro s~…ēinuw, ms~…ēromul mkajal ő≤kis~…ē na …£luw knerin ro kmajan mańßa, "nju ¶~ ®u mwańß mińßuj ő≤ulit ¶~ ®ns~…ēali mo." mus~…ēa s~…ēmwal luŇčan …£luw ina la, s~…ēmwan luŇčan nańßa la…£a, pps~…ēijej …£a mwańß m…£leŇč pkajal jow na …£a…£a ¶~ ®puŇč mus~…ēa pis~…ēa ő≤tijux ro j Ēaja innaras~…ē nańßa.
S.FORM: smiyey tmalam myasa owas na piyiyt "sili' laga ba'un musa sali na krakis la, ppsiyey ro kwara ppgluw memow plukus lukus lmwan musa sali ina kya laga, ini tkkoh skal yow na pns'unan, mnangi maha nya mwah mtisan, ms'un mcpung owas na lmuhuw, mkal yow na 'nxan naha nanak, ppsiyey ga lmon maras rami ro uwow ro sinuw, msromul mkayal bkis na gluw knerin ro kmayan maha, "nyu cu mwah mihuy bulit cnsali mo." musa smwal lungan gluw ina la, smwan lungan naha laga, ppsiyey ga mwah mgleng pkayal yow na gaga cpung musa pisa btiyux ro y'aya innaras naha.
S.PHON: s~…ēmijej tmalam mjas~…ēa owas~…ē na pijijt "s~…ēili Ē la…£a ő≤a Ēun mus~…ēa s~…ēali na krakis~…ē la, pps~…ēijej ro kwara pp…£luw memow plukus~…ē lukus~…ē lmwan mus~…ēa s~…ēali ina kja la…£a, ini tkkońß s~…ēkal jow na pns~…ē Ēunan, mnaŇči mańßa nja mwańß mtis~…ēan, ms~…ē Ēun m ¶~ ®puŇč owas~…ē na lmuńßuw, mkal jow na Ēnxan nańßa nanak, pps~…ēijej …£a lmon maras~…ē rami ro uwow ro s~…ēinuw, ms~…ēromul mkajal ő≤kis~…ē na …£luw knerin ro kmajan mańßa, "nju ¶~ ®u mwańß mińßuj ő≤ulit ¶~ ®ns~…ēali mo." mus~…ēa s~…ēmwal luŇčan …£luw ina la, s~…ēmwan luŇčan nańßa la…£a, pps~…ēijej …£a mwańß m…£leŇč pkajal jow na …£a…£a ¶~ ®puŇč mus~…ēa pis~…ēa ő≤tijux ro j Ēaja innaras~…ē nańßa.
